<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/workspace_list
<code>
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/workspace_list")
public class WorkspaceController {
    @Autowired private JdbcTemplate jdbc;

    @GetMapping("/search")
    public List<Map<String, Object>> search(@RequestParam String q) {
        return jdbc.queryForList("SELECT * FROM workspace_list WHERE title LIKE '%" + q + "%'");
    }
}
<fixed_code>

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in Go Gin GET /api/customer
<code>
func searchCustomers(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("label")
    rows, _ := db.Query(fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM customer WHERE label LIKE '%%%s%%'", q))
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Customer
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Customer
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Label)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}
<fixed_code>

<issue>hardcoded_credentials, broken_authentication (CWE-798, CWE-287) in JavaScript Express.js POST /api/auth/login
<code>
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const JWT_SECRET = 'super-secret-jwt-2836';

app.post('/api/auth/login', (req, res) => {
    const user = users.find(u => u.email === req.body.email && u.password === req.body.password);
    if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Bad creds' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id, role: user.role }, JWT_SECRET);
    res.json({ token });
});
